user.title: Sign in to PetLibro Lite

pick.title: Pick a feeder
pick.description: Multiple feeders were found on this account. Choose which one to add.

video.title: Live video (optional)
video.description: Video requires a P2P admin hash captured from the PetLibro Lite mobile app — see docs/video_setup.md. Leave both fields blank to skip video. Every non-video feature works without it.

error.cloud_auth: Login rejected — see message above the form for the server's reason.
error.no_devices_found: No PetLibro feeders found on the LAN that belong to this account. Check the feeder is powered on, connected to Wi-Fi, and on the same LAN as Home Assistant. If it is, try again and fill in the LAN IP field manually.

init.title: PetLibro Lite settings
init.description:
Reconfigure the existing entry. Leave the email + password blank to keep the current cloud session; fill them in to re-authenticate (useful when the session expires or the device's local key rotates after a factory reset).

LAN IP is optional — fill it in only if the feeder moved to a new address.

P2P admin hash controls the camera entity. Leave blank to turn video off; paste a hash to enable it.

{reason}

data.cloud_password: Password (leave blank to keep current session)

error.cloud_incomplete: Enter both email and password, or leave both blank to keep the current session.
error.cloud_auth: Login rejected — see message above the form for the server's reason.
